blockers: TELONEX_API_KEY is not set in the current environment

checks.label: Candidate outputs exist
checks.reason: The acceptance gate only becomes decisive after the promotion-data pipeline writes a candidate gate.

checks.label: Clean model-ready markets
checks.reason: Only strict-complete individual 5-minute windows can enter the model-ready universe.

checks.label: Incremental clean markets
checks.reason: The promotion backfill must close the clean-market gap that existed before the run.

checks.label: Half-covered days
checks.reason: Dense but not necessarily full days are needed for regime and time-of-day validation.

checks.label: Incremental half-covered days
checks.reason: The selected dense-day plan is supposed to close the half-covered-day gap.

checks.label: Paper gate passed
checks.reason: A refreshed candidate that loses paper eligibility should not advance.

checks.label: Small-live gate passed
checks.reason: Small-live review requires the selected-policy live gate to clear after new data is included.

checks.label: Selected forward days
checks.reason: The selector needs enough independent forward dates before risking live capital.

checks.label: Incremental selected forward days
checks.reason: The promotion run should add the missing selected-policy forward days, not just more rows.

checks.label: Selected-policy signals
checks.reason: The selected policy needs a broader set of filled and unfilled states.

checks.label: Incremental selected-policy signals
checks.reason: The promotion run should close the signal-count gap.

checks.label: Positive selected forward days
checks.reason: Most selected forward days should be profitable before live sizing.

interpretation: Waiting for backfill: TELONEX_API_KEY is not set in the current environment; candidate promotion gate not found: docs/data/model_promotion_gate_promotion_data.json. Acceptance will require at least 2,000 clean model-ready markets, 10 half-covered days, 10 selected forward days, and 500 selected-policy signals.
